title: ImprovementLog
description: Changelog of edits applied by W14 to the manuscript. Each entry links back to the annotation that triggered it and records validator checks, risk level and word/ref deltas. Canonical anchors: manuscript v5 = 3469/3500 words, 50/50 refs.

version.description: Monotonic version of the improvement log document.

entry_id.description: Unique identifier of the improvement entry.

timestamp.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the edit was applied.

annotation_id.description: Identifier of the annotation that triggered this edit (see annotations.schema.json).

para_id.description: Paragraph id affected by the edit.

para_section.description: Section label of the paragraph (e.g. Abstract, Methods, Results, Discussion).

lift_estimate.description: Estimated absolute lift in the EID score after this edit.

risk.description: Residual risk introduced by this edit.

agents_used.description: Identifiers of agents that contributed to this edit.

validator_passed.description: True if every check in validator_checks passed.

canonical_ok.description: Canonical facts preserved (136/103/33 cases, BSS 68.1%/36.5%, etc.).

word_count_ok.description: Word count remains within EID cap (<= 3500).

refs_count_ok.description: Reference count remains within EID cap (<= 50).

word_count_delta.description: Change in total word count (positive = added, negative = removed).

refs_delta.description: Change in total reference count (positive = added, negative = removed).
